title: RSW Christmas 8 Metre Gift Wrap Pack – 4 x 2M Wrapping Paper Rolls, 2 x 2M Raffia Ribbons & 8 Tags – Woodland, Script, Floral & Plain Designs
features: COMPLETE WRAPPING KIT – Includes 4 x 2 metre gift wrap rolls, 2 x 2 metre raffia ribbons, and 8 matching tags
WOODLAND, SCRIPT & FLORAL DESIGNS – Stylish mix of coordinating designs plus a plain option for an elegant finish
ECO-FRIENDLY WRAP – Plastic-free paper that is easy to cut and fold for neat, professional wrapping
MATCHING TAGS INCLUDED – Includes gift tags to easily label and personalise each present
PERFECT FOR CHRISTMAS – 8 metres of wrapping paper ideal for multiple gifts, families, and festive occasions
description: Elevate your festive wrapping this year with the RSW 8 Metre Christmas Wrap Pack, designed to make gift wrapping easier and more stylish. This all-in-one set includes four 2 metre rolls of high-quality wrapping paper, two 2 metre lengths of raffia ribbon, and eight matching gift tags. The pack features a coordinated mix of designs: an elegant woodland print with trees and foliage, a chic gold Christmas script pattern, a classic floral motif, and a plain wrap for a minimalistic finish. Made from plastic-free, eco-friendly paper, this wrap is easy to cut and fold, helping you achieve a neat, professional look for all your presents. The raffia ribbons add texture and rustic charm, while the included tags make it simple to label your gifts. Ideal for families, offices, or anyone with a pile of Christmas presents to wrap, this 8 metre gift wrap pack provides plenty of coverage while keeping your wrapping theme consistent. With stylish designs and practical accessories, it’s the perfect way to ensure your gifts look beautiful under the tree.
